name: Byrn, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Corporate History Byrn, Inc. f/k/a Quture International, Inc. (Byrn, we, us, or, the Company), is a Nevada corporation that was formed in April 2011 to become an emerging healthcare knowledge solution company created to transform health and healthcare by developing the standard in measuring clinical performance and outcomes. The Company developed medical software with tools and analytics intended to reduce costs while improving clinical performance, outcomes, predictive insight, ...
